text.zh: AlexNet 在 ImageNet 2012 中以深度卷积网络显著提升图像分类结果。
text.en: AlexNet substantially improved image classification results with a deep convolutional network in ImageNet 2012.

text.zh: AlexNet 的突破结合了 GPU 训练、ReLU、数据增强和 dropout 等规模化训练要素。
text.en: AlexNet combined scaled training ingredients including GPUs, ReLU, data augmentation, and dropout.
